original: The Jolthammer is a weapon based on an age-old design but given a modern flair by the engineers at KihaCorp. It’s heavy, conductive head is actually divided by several layers of non-conductive materials, allowing it to build up opposing electrical charges - much like a modern supercapacitor. On impact, this energy is discharged through the target creature, frying nerves and crushing bone with equal authority.
